base_model: godot/assets/gizmo.glb (meshy.ai origin, 53-bone UniRig skeleton; shipped file untouched per gizmo-asset-pipeline canon)
content: animation-only GLB (armature + NLA tracks, mesh stripped); grafted onto the live model at runtime by scripts/player/gizmo_animator.gd. campfire_sit is a looping cinematic seat played via GizmoAnimator.play_campfire_sit() for the lore lane's opening; spark_cast is the dedicated underhand spark lob wired to cast_started; idle_fidget_* are authored personality idle-breakers (clips present, idle-break driver pending).
credits_note: zero-credit path: Meshy rig/animate was aborted before spend (no source task in account; asset upload to public hosts denied by policy) — see docs/asset-lab/animation-ledger.md
motion_language: handcrafted-mechanical per design-handoff/ART_DIRECTION.md — anticipation, snap, overshoot, settle; antenna (Bone_016) carries follow-through
verification: per-pose stills rendered via --render-dir and visually reviewed (sign convention for up-bones corrected against renders)
